description: Navy blue backpack with one main zipped compartment which has an inner slip pocket and an external zipped pocket on the top Branding on the exterior and three haul loop handles on three sides to carry the bag in your hand in any direction An external mesh pouch pocket on the side Two compression straps on one side A detachable strap for carrying the bag on your shoulder Padded back A zipped flap at the back to stow away two adjustable shoulders straps and a haul loop when not being carried as a backpack, can be rolled up and attached to the top with velcro closure to carry the bag as a backpack Warranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
